top_signals.title: Robinson Fresh opens border cold-chain hub as Mexico produce imports grow
top_signals.summary:
Robinson Fresh executives say the company’s newest South Texas logistics center will help customers navigate increasingly complex supply chains.

The post Robinson Fresh opens border cold-chain hub as Mexico produce imports grow  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
